title: AntiGEO Proposal
description: Schema for an AntiGEO proposal record used to submit, review, and decide governance actions related to entities, statuses, and associated records.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for the proposal record.

title.description: Short human-readable title of the proposal.

entity_ids.description: List of related entity identifiers referenced by this proposal.

evidence_ids.description: Optional list of related evidence identifiers supporting this proposal.

current_status.description: Current status of the related entity or entities when the proposal is created.

proposed_status.description: Target status proposed for the related entity or entities, when applicable.

summary.description: Short summary of the proposal objective and supporting grounds.

rationale.description: Longer explanation of the proposal rationale.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the proposal record was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the proposal record was last updated.

review_status.description: Current review stage of the proposal.

decision.description: Current or final decision associated with the proposal.

source_type.description: Optional lightweight source label describing how the proposal entered the governance process.

submitted_by.description: Optional lightweight submitter label or identifier.

notes.description: Optional freeform notes about the proposal.

related_proposal_ids.description: Optional list of related proposal identifiers.

decision_reason.description: Optional short explanation of the current or final decision.
